# QuizSolver — AI Quiz Solver Chrome Extension

> QuizSolver is a Chrome browser extension that uses artificial intelligence to instantly solve quizzes across 10+ educational platforms including Testportal, Moodle, Canvas LMS, Google Forms, Kahoot, Quizizz, Blackboard, Microsoft Forms, Quizlet, and Socrative.

## What is QuizSolver?

QuizSolver is an AI-powered Chrome extension for students. When a student is taking an online quiz, QuizSolver reads the visible question and answer options on the page, sends them to an AI model, and displays an answer suggestion with a detailed step-by-step explanation — all inside a browser side panel without the student needing to switch tabs or leave the quiz page.

**Key capabilities:**
- Instant AI answer suggestions for multiple choice, single choice, true/false, short answer, and essay questions
- Step-by-step explanations so students can actually learn the concept
- FocusScan tool: screenshot any region of the screen to solve questions embedded in images, canvases, or iframes
- Automatic save to question history — all solved questions are stored for later review
- Practice quiz generator — create flashcard-style quizzes from question history
- Kahoot Quiz ID mode — load the full answer bank for a Kahoot quiz without spending credits, using only the Quiz ID from the URL
- Works in Chrome Side Panel — no tab switching required

## Supported Platforms

| Platform | URL Pattern | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Testportal | testportal.pl, testportal.net | Auto-detect questions |
| Moodle | any Moodle instance | Supports math/LaTeX |
| Canvas LMS | instructure.com | Supports LTI via FocusScan |
| Google Forms | docs.google.com/forms | All question types |
| Kahoot | kahoot.it | Auto-solve + Quiz ID mode |
| Quizizz | quizizz.com | Homework and live mode |
| Blackboard | blackboard.com | Classic and Ultra |
| Microsoft Forms | forms.office.com | All question types |
| Quizlet | quizlet.com | Learn mode, tests, matching |
| Socrative | socrative.com | Live quiz rooms |

## Pricing

QuizSolver uses a credit-based system. Users receive free starting credits upon registration. Additional credits are purchased as one-time top-up packages (no subscription required). Credits are consumed per AI query; Kahoot Quiz ID lookups do not consume credits.

## Important URLs

- Home: https://getquizsolver.com/
- AI quiz solver landing page: https://getquizsolver.com/quiz-solver-ai
- Interactive demo: https://getquizsolver.com/demo
- Credits and one-time top-ups: https://getquizsolver.com/credits
- Saved quiz history and practice mode: https://getquizsolver.com/quiz
- Blog and platform guides: https://getquizsolver.com/blog
- Testportal guide: https://getquizsolver.com/testportal-quiz-solver
- Google Forms guide: https://getquizsolver.com/google-forms-quiz-solver
- Kahoot AI bot guide: https://getquizsolver.com/kahoot-ai-bot
- Quizizz guide: https://getquizsolver.com/quizizz-solver

## Credit Delivery Note

Credit purchases are delivered to the QuizSolver account email entered during checkout. Users should use the same email as their QuizSolver account and avoid changing it during Lemon Squeezy checkout, otherwise credits may not attach automatically.

## How to Install

1. Visit the Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/quiz-solver-pro/cjchfdnplpjkihigljnicebnhjkpndik
2. Click "Add to Chrome"
3. Pin the QuizSolver icon to the Chrome toolbar
4. Create a free account at https://getquizsolver.com
5. Open any supported quiz page and click the QuizSolver icon

## Languages Supported

The QuizSolver website and extension UI are available in: English (en), Polish (pl), German (de), Spanish (es), French (fr), Italian (it), Ukrainian (uk).

## Company Information

- **Website:** https://getquizsolver.com
- **Chrome Web Store:** https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/quiz-solver-pro/cjchfdnplpjkihigljnicebnhjkpndik
- **Support email:** support@getquizsolver.com
- **Privacy policy:** https://getquizsolver.com/privacy

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Does QuizSolver work on all websites?**
A: It automatically detects questions on supported platforms. For any other website, the FocusScan tool lets you capture any screen region containing a question.

**Q: Is it detectable by anti-cheat systems?**
A: QuizSolver runs in the browser's standard extension sandbox inside a Side Panel. It does not inject scripts into quiz pages beyond what is needed to read visible DOM content.

**Q: Does it submit answers automatically?**
A: No. QuizSolver only suggests answers. The student always decides what to submit.

**Q: What is Kahoot Quiz ID?**
A: The Quiz ID is the unique identifier of a Kahoot quiz, visible in the URL after `quizId=`. It is different from the live game PIN. Entering the Quiz ID in QuizSolver displays all questions and correct answers without using AI credits.

**Q: Is it free?**
A: Yes, with free starting credits. Additional credits are purchased as needed. Kahoot Quiz ID mode is always free.
